expectations.evidence: Explicitly calls out: 'Issue 5: Newspaper metaphor violated — The file reads bottom-up: private helpers at top, public API at bottom. The Newspaper metaphor says high-level (exports) go at the top, implementation details sink to the bottom.'
Proposed structure has `user.test.ts` inside `features/user/` next to source. Explicitly states: 'Colocation rule violated: tests belong next to the code they test.'
Proposes `features/user/`, `features/order/`, `features/product/` structure instead of controllers/models/services. States: 'Grouped by type, not by feature' as the core problem.
